item.title: My bottom shelf brain is melted cheese 275/744 hour
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
& here's my resume. Hire me.
You can find more memes at discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
We have been currently streaming live for 275 hours to help raise money on behalf of Imgur for Extra-Life. You can catch us live for the next 20 days, 7 hours, 19 minutes, and 14 seconds on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
┌∩┐(ಠ_ಠ)┌∩┐you @CrimeBrulee >:(
This beautiful piece of art was made by our very own @tallandartsy who has put it up for donation for our bottom shelf community auction. All money raised by the auction will go straight to Extra-Life. Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka for more information on how to donate a piece or bid on a piece ❤️
POV me trying to play anything while living under same roof as Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.

item.title: Images of Note: That Sounds illegal, I'm in
item.description:
Purity culture is the idea that women, specifically, are consumables.
EARTH: HOME OF CHALLENGE PISSING, THAT'S RIGHT, CHALLENGE PISSING!
that's basically it.
ARSON SKIRT!
And you don't seem to understand...
Whoever does this wants to erase history, and whoever wants to erase history wants to control the narrative.
To be fair, it was Will Keith Kellogg, not John Harvey, who set up Kelloggs.
If your ideology can be defeated with MDMA then maybe your ideology isn't as valid as you think it is.
The fact Quantum Computers are a thing now is kinda fucking wild.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Uh. I don’t remember saving this.
item.dc:creator: DietLoki

item.title: Three years maintaining 55ish-pound weight loss
item.description:
I can almost bench press my weight, and I do 3x8 at 110 on triceps extension now.
I haven't been a size 4 since high school.
My starting point. Losing it was hard AF but maintaining not so bad, especially since I absolutely love veggies now!
item.dc:creator: amb1021

item.dc:creator: LaunchpadMc

item.title: Illness
item.description: Been waiting to post this dump for a very long time, but it's finally time. Losing my job over my illness, and just no idea what to do with life or how to maintain finances/insurance. I need a purpose. The systems in our society has no real support for this. Pain, and more pain. Sometimes it's too much. I used to travel the world, now I can't leave the house. It helps to vent. Shoutout to @mooyoutoo2 @atalantaa @thatpug @jessag87 I hope you are well.
item.dc:creator: Cobalt1

item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: It's Funny Friday time! A dump of things to help you end the week with a laugh
item.description:
Hi everyone and welcome to the latest Funny Friday! As always, remember that there's a link to bonus in the comments, full of stuff with more adult humor. So if you want to check it out, look for the link in the comments. Now let's have some fun and enjoy the dump!
The endless chase to find a single molecule of dopamine left in my brain.
They know exactly what they're doing here.
Look, you didn't know grandpa the way some of us did...
The eternal struggle with myself when I'm underleveled and facing a boss.
Perfect for Spooky Season.
Gee, I wonder what it could be...
He's in danger... the good kind of danger.
Indiana Jones sends his regards.
Behold! A woman!
Take me home!
Little mixup in HR...
The ORIGINAL smash bros...
Yeah Tuvok, of the ship, not anyone's fragile heterosexuality!
I don't have a cat and my dog died last year, so this is the closest thing you'll get to a dog tax on this dump
And here's the closest you'll get to a cat tax. Happy Friday to everyone, hope you have a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: 11/? Mayor from Powerpuff Girls
item.description: “Thanks to you girls, Townsville is safe!” 11/?? Mayor from Powerpuff Girls I am doing a costume a day for the entire month and I am raising money for charity while doing so! Read more about it here :) https://imgur.com/gallery/see-y-all-tomorrow-GJKtKLD
item.dc:creator: josiemarcellino

item.title: In case any of you are looking for answers, look into it
item.description: Ever since I got Covid, I always felt like my lungs were heavier than usual, and it took more energy to breathe. I was also filled to the brim with mucus (TMI I know). I thought I would live forever like this until I finally saw an allergist. Now I am on prescription antihistamines** and feel 99% like I did before. I hope my journey provides some hope for someone else. **EDIT: for those of you asking, I’m on Cromolyn - I googled it and I was incorrect in calling it an antihistamine, it’s actually a mast cell stabilizer that has a downstream effect of reducing histamine release.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: People are Insane.
item.description:
https://www.rollingstone.com/culture/culture-features/hurricane-milton-misinformation-meteorlogist-death-threats-1235130352/
You might have seen this interaction. This is a TV meteorologist from Michigan who had a seemingly “harmless” interaction on her FB. Turns out, this ended up getting her death threats in her inbox. Absolutely disgusting these people can get away with these threats and see no repercussions. Even if it’s a troll, they need to be charged.

item.title: Halloween joke
item.description: I saw this in a post here and made my own. I took a picture of my office area and used an AI to replace an office door with a staircase. Hung it up within view of my desk and watched as people found it. Lots of speculation as to who made it. Thanks Imgur for a fun prank!
item.dc:creator: myeyesthegogglesdonothing
